commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Moreover the word of the LORD came unto me, saying, Jeremiah, what see you. And I said, I see a rod of an almond tree. Hebrew, "of an almond. "Septuagint, "nut-tree. "(Haydock) The almond-tree flourishes in January, and bears fruit in March. (Theodoret) (Pliny, xvi. ) Thus God will speedily send his scourge from Babylon, to punish his people. (Calmet) The sense is the same. (Menochius) God's law is outwardly bitter, but the kernel is sweet. (Theodoret) (Worthington).
